title: Research Tools
description: JSON Schema definitions for research and web search tools available to the Ideas-Brillantes LLM assistant. These tools support web searches, fetching and extracting web content, summarising text, and producing structured research reports.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Perform a web search using a natural language query and return a list of results.

num_results.description: The number of search results to return. Defaults to 10.

date_range.description: Restrict results to a recency window. Defaults to 'any' (no date restriction).

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch the content of a URL and return it in the specified extraction mode.

url.description: The URL of the page or resource to fetch.

extract_mode.description: How to process the fetched page. 'main_content' strips navigation/ads and returns the article body. Defaults to main_content.

tools.name: extract_content
tools.description: Extract specific pieces of content from a web page using CSS selectors.

url.description: The URL of the web page to extract content from.

selectors.description: Optional list of CSS selectors identifying the elements to extract. If omitted, the full page text is returned.

tools.name: summarize_content
tools.description: Produce a concise summary of a given text using the assistant's language capabilities.

format.description: The desired output format for the summary. Defaults to a paragraph.

length.description: The approximate length of the summary. Defaults to medium.

tools.name: create_research_report
tools.description: Compile a structured research report on a topic from a list of source URLs or text excerpts.

topic.description: The subject or question the research report should address.

sources.description: A list of source URLs or text excerpts to use as the evidence base for the report.
